summary: iter225 — Quiz champion challenge USD canonical fix verified end-to-end. Backend pytest 1/1 (unit) + E2E 4/4 PASS. Frontend Tests 4-7 PASS (DefyChampionModal Bob in paid mode + ChallengePage Daf breakdown). All required data-testids present and correctly populated. The XAF mensonger bug is fixed: stake_currency='USD' canonical, with display currency '≈ XAF' shown separately. stake_min=1/stake_max=200 USD enforced both BE (400 with exact French messages) and FE (toast feedback). The breakdown card on the champion side renders BEFORE the accept/refuse buttons with Pot/Commission/Net winnings, and accept is enabled when balance is sufficient.
critical_code_review_comments: Login API has high latency (12-15s+ p99 on preview, occasional 502). Tests had to add retry+long timeouts. Not blocking iter225 but worth investigating in a separate iteration (likely password hashing cost factor or DB connection pool).
DefyChampionModal correctly fetches /api/wallet/balance and gates the submit button on balance — confirmed visually (47 624 USD shown, 20 USD stake, breakdown +34 USD net).

ChallengeDetail card uses semantic data-testids matching spec exactly (challenge-stake-breakdown, challenge-opponent-name, challenge-stake-amount, challenge-net-winnings, challenge-balance-info, quiz-challenge-accept, quiz-challenge-refuse) — clean.
test_credentials: Bob: bob@japap.com / Test1234! ; Daf: mirtoken2022@gmail.com / Daf2026! ; captcha bypass: JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 / 0
seed_data_creation: None. Demo challenge qcc_3a4b8467047e40f2 PRESERVED (NOT accepted/refused per instructions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter225 fully validated. The enriched GET /api/quiz/champion/challenges/{cid} returns: stake_currency=USD, commission_pct=15.0, viewer_balance=81094.55 USD (Daf), challenger.name=Bob, champion.name='Daf Unity'. POST /challenge enforces stake_min=1 ('Mise minimale : 1 USD.') and stake_max=200 ('Mise maximale : 200 USD.'). DefyChampionModal shows USD canonical with XAF display approximation. ChallengePage shows full breakdown card (Pot/Commission/Gains nets) BEFORE accept/refuse buttons. Free mode regression: backend correctly returns 409 'Un défi ouvert existe déjà avec ce champion' (no 5xx).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in iter225. Initial pre-iter225 bug (XAF mensonger in modal) was correctly fixed by main agent: DefyChampionModal now displays USD canonical via fetchWalletBalance + commission/pot breakdown component, and QuizChallengePage ChallengeDetail renders the breakdown card with all required data-testids before the accept/refuse buttons.
